title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Finout, a cloud cost management SaaS company (100+ people across Tel Aviv and New York, $85M+ raised), is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations reporting to the CRO to build and scale the operational backbone of its GTM engine. Requires 7+ years in RevOps, Sales Ops, or Strategy within high-growth B2B SaaS, experience scaling revenue operations beyond $30M+ ARR, deep Salesforce administration and revenue analytics expertise, and a hands-on builder-doer mindset. Collaboration with globally distributed teams across time zones, including the Tel Aviv HQ.
score_reason: Exceptional match: 15+ years SaaS experience exceeds 7+ requirement, fintech/B2B SaaS alignment, strong Salesforce expertise, and proven ability to scale revenue operations. Tel Aviv HQ with NYC presence perfectly matches candidate's location preferences.
ai_opener: Omri, I came across Finout's Head of Revenue Operations role and immediately thought of you—their focus on scaling the GTM engine for a $85M+ funded cloud cost management platform aligns perfectly with your 15+ years building revenue operations at scale in B2B SaaS. Your deep Salesforce expertise and track record managing complex, globally distributed GTM operations would be exactly what they need to accelerate from their current stage. Would be worth a conversation with their CRO.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Render, a modern cloud platform for developers building AI-native, full-stack applications, seeks a Head of Revenue Operations. The role requires 8-12 years in Revenue Operations, Sales Strategy, or GTM Operations, ideally at a B2B SaaS company with a PLG motion layered with enterprise sales, plus proven experience building RevOps infrastructure from the ground up. A strong candidate combines strategic leadership with hands-on execution to support Render's rapid growth across developer-focused products.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps directly exceeds the 8-12 year requirement, and his expertise in pipeline forecasting, GTM strategy, and building RevOps infrastructure from scratch aligns perfectly with Render's need to scale a PLG+enterprise hybrid motion for an AI-native platform.
ai_opener: Render's developer-first approach to AI infrastructure caught my attention—building GTM motion for a PLG platform with enterprise sales layering is exactly the inflection point I've navigated multiple times. With 15+ years scaling RevOps infrastructure in B2B SaaS, I've built the playbooks that connect product-led growth signals to enterprise sales velocity, and I'd welcome exploring how to apply that to Render's growth trajectory.

title: Head of Revenue Operations
description: Cyngn, an autonomous vehicle/robotics technology company, is hiring a Head of Revenue Operations. The role requires 8+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Operations, or a similar GTM analytics role in B2B SaaS or enterprise software. Responsibilities include data analytics, forecasting, funnel modeling, and KPI tracking with CRM and BI tools, building systems that accelerate pipeline velocity and improve forecast precision, and working cross-functionally with sales, marketing, finance, and product to unify GTM execution. Robotics, IoT, or high-tech B2B experience is a plus.
score_reason: Omri's 15+ years in B2B SaaS RevOps directly matches the 8+ year requirement, with core expertise in forecasting, pipeline velocity, and cross-functional GTM execution. The remote location and enterprise software focus align perfectly, with high-tech/robotics experience being a valuable bonus for Cyngn's autonomous vehicle positioning.
ai_opener: I noticed Cyngn is building the next generation of autonomous vehicle technology—a space where GTM precision directly impacts enterprise deal cycles and expansion velocity. With 15+ years scaling RevOps at B2B SaaS companies, I've built the exact forecasting and funnel systems that accelerate pipeline maturity in complex sales environments, and I'm particularly interested in applying that to the high-tech/robotics sector where data-driven revenue execution becomes a competitive advantage.

title: RevOps Manager
description: Instrumentl, a YC-backed grant-management SaaS startup serving 5,000+ nonprofits, seeks a RevOps Manager to own the technical infrastructure powering its revenue engine. This builder role involves architecting the CRM data model, integrating data sources, and leading the technical implementation of AI tools across sales processes. Requires 3-5+ years in Revenue Operations, Sales Ops, Marketing Ops, or GTM Systems at a B2B SaaS company, strong technical skills (SQL, APIs, complex workflows), hands-on CRM administration (HubSpot preferred), and data architecture/integration experience.
score_reason: Strong alignment with Omri's RevOps expertise, B2B SaaS background, and technical skills (CRM architecture, data integration, AI-native GTM). Perfect remote setup. Only minor gap: Instrumentl's nonprofit focus vs. his fintech/enterprise specialization, but the technical scope is ideal for a 15+ year operator.
ai_opener: I've been architecting revenue infrastructure at scale for 15+ years, and Instrumentl's approach to powering nonprofit growth through AI-native RevOps resonates deeply. Your description of owning CRM data models and leading AI implementation across sales processes—that's exactly where I've built competitive moats at previous companies. I'd love to explore how my experience with complex Salesforce/HubSpot ecosystems and pipeline forecasting could accelerate your GTM motion.

title: Revenue Operations Manager (Sales)

The role supports a fast-growing legal-tech SaaS company on a mission to accelerate real estate due diligence by up to 70%. title: Lead GTM Engineer
description: Engine, a business travel and spend-management platform serving 20,000+ companies, is building a Growth Engineering function and seeks a Lead GTM Engineer to own and shape it. You'll build systems that aggregate signals to power outbound and growth, design automations and internal tools, and partner with Sales, Marketing, Product, and Data. Requires experience building production software in growth/marketing/sales-adjacent environments, strong Python proficiency (Node.js a plus), experience integrating GTM systems like Salesforce and Outreach, and people-leadership readiness.

Engine's vision to systematize growth signals resonates with how I've approached RevOps, though I'm curious how you're balancing the engineering-first build versus leveraging existing GTM platforms—happy to explore whether my GTM strategy and systems background complements your technical roadmap.
